infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FileTract needs camera access to photograph ID cards and documents for field extraction.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FileTract needs photo library access to select ID card images for processing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: FileTract needs permission to save processed document images.
